message:
feat: add --test-connectivity flag to check command

- Add optional network connectivity testing for proxies
- Run tests in parallel using existing health check logic
- Display results in both human-readable and JSON formats
- Show latency for successful connections
- Distinguish between timeout, auth required, and connection failures

(rust_proxy-4ce.6)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
